title: Phase 0: Project Scaffolding + Coverage Infrastructure
description: Set up the full project skeleton with dual Rust+Python structure, shared Gherkin specs, and coverage tooling. One smoke-test feature passes in both languages at 100% coverage from the first commit. See Vision.md for full details.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Phase 0 complete. make check fully green: Python 100% coverage, Rust 100% coverage, parity 7/7 steps, all lint clean. Committed and pushed.
